title: createRoot
description: Creates a reactive root that owns all computations inside it, with a dispose function for teardown.
signature: createRoot<T>(fn: (dispose: () => void) => T, detachedOwner?: Owner): T
param_fn_desc: Function that runs within the root. Receives a dispose function to tear down all owned computations.
param_detached_owner_desc: Optional. Parent owner for the root. When provided, the root is attached to this owner's context chain (for lookupContext) but still independently disposable.
usage_self_disposing_scope: The page writer watches each request until it settles. It opens a <0>createRoot</0> and runs an effect that reads the request's state. Once the page reaches <1>ready</1> or <2>failed</2>, the effect calls <0>dispose</0> to tear down the root and stop tracking.
info_render_root: <0>render()</0> creates a root automatically. You only need <1>createRoot</1> for standalone reactive scopes outside of <2>render()</2>, such as this watcher or a test.
in_the_wild: See this watcher settle live pages in the <0>page-writer walkthrough</0>.
